title: Marketplace Manager - FreshToHome Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FreshToHome Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome Capital India! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome Capital India:
FreshToHome Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome Capital India!
